sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115489" key="yeudodi/pteros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδο-δίπτερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n115489.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">false dipteral,</tr_> of a temple in which there is only one row of columns along the sides, though there is space left for two, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.2.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
